experiments.setup.title: Experiment setup state
experiments.setup.description: Traffic Experiments read split traffic from routing tiers. This page reports evidence and does not change weights.
experiments.setup.bullets.liveSplit: Traffic Experiments use live routing split weights on a tier; split variants receive real requests.
experiments.setup.bullets.notEvals: Evals are controlled primary/candidate/judge runs, not live split dashboards.
experiments.setup.bullets.notShadow: Shadow Traffic mirrors sampled copies; it does not divide primary traffic.
experiments.setup.bullets.noAutomation: This page does not auto-promote winners or change routing weights.
